arts.ttl: 5 reasons Heidenheim will beat Chelsea in the UEFA Conference League
arts.sum: Frank Schmidt's side have recorded three wins from the opening three games of their maiden campaign in European competition, beating Slovenian side Olimpija 2-1 at home on Matchday 1, before travelling to Cyprus and Scotland respectively for Matchdays 2 and 3, in which they triumphed 1-0 over Pafos and 2-0 over Hearts. Heidenheim host Chelsea on Matchday 4 of this season’s UEFA Conference League as the hosts look to extend their 100 percent win record in the competition.

arts.ttl: Chelsea flop lashes out at Mauricio Pochettino with shock Tottenham transfer revelation
arts.sum: The France defender, who left Stamford Bridge in the summer following four years of footballing purgatory, has also criticised the club's transfer methods. Having arrived in 2020 on a free from Nice, Sarr would only play 21 times for Chelsea, heading out on loan twice before joining Lens at the end of his contract in June.

arts.ttl: £26m Chelsea player ranked as more impactful this season than Moises Caicedo
arts.sum: There’s several Chelsea stars so far this season that have performed somewhere close to their best, including midfield maestro Moises Caicedo. It’s been a tough...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca has a surprise Chelsea leader developing in the background ahead of next season
arts.sum: Maresca did also go on to say that Chelsea "don't have a proper leader" and they "need to build them" . Reece James is the Blues' captain but head coach Enzo Maresca recently stated that he "expects more" from the right-back in terms of leadership inside the changing room.

arts.ttl: Big Broja Everton boost, Sterling impact and Fofana goal in Chelsea loan latest
arts.sum: Broja isn't the only Chelsea loanee who will be looking to make his mark in the weeks ahead as players such as Raheem Sterling and David Datro Fofana look to wow for Arsenal and Goztepe respectively. Alfie Gilchrist played the full 90 minutes on Saturday afternoon as Coventry City and Sheffield United played out an eventful 2-2 draw at the CBS Arena.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca without key Chelsea duo for Heidenheim clash after honest admission
arts.sum: While James is not fit anyway, it looks as if Fofana and Lavia, after both taking part on Saturday, will be rested for the match in Germany. Fofana started and completed 90 minutes against Leicester at the weekend, while Lavia was a second-half substitute in the win at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: I owe Todd Boehly and Behdad Eghbali an apology and it's all because of Enzo Maresca - Bobby Vincent - football.london
arts.sum: Winning the final six matches of the 2023/24 season, finishing with 19 more points than the campaign before, reaching a Carabao Cup final and bringing European football back to Stamford Bridge, Pochettino did make progress with Chelsea . Chelsea have scored more goals and conceded fewer than City, last season's champions.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca poised for inflated transfer budget next season as Chelsea tap into £500m fund - finance expert
Arsenal, Chelsea 'handed Barcelona problem' in pursuit of Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly deal a blow to Arsenal and Chelsea's hopes of signing Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: 'I think': Ben Foster makes claim about Chelsea's chances of finishing in the PL's top four this season
arts.sum: Chelsea have finished outside the Premier League’s top four positions in the last two consecutive seasons, but it feels like the expectation is rising on...
